title: silene tenuis subsp. paucifolia
intro: Silene tenuis subsp. paucifolia, also known as the slender catchfly, is a plant species within the silene family, characterized by its delicate white or pinkish flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Silene tenuis subsp. paucifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Silene tenuis subsp. paucifolia include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
